Projects
Neon Fables
An animated series of self-contained fables set to a synthwave score. Hand-drawn 2D cel animation with a glowing, neon-drenched visual language.
Animation Music Video Synthwave
Glitch Garden
A puzzle game where you grow and wire living plants to solve generative circuits. Each species behaves differently — patience is the only mechanic that matters.
Installation Art Generative Interactive
